title: hieracium chalcidicum subsp. divaricatum
intro: Hieracium chalcidicum subsp. divaricatum is a lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, commonly referred to as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential treatment for wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium chalcicicum subsp. divaricatum include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. Hierbal preparations of Hieracium chalcidicum subsp. divaricatum often involve infusion or decoction of the leaves or roots to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
